targets.expr:
(
  count(tgw_RunStatus_platformState{} != 99 and tgw_RunStatus_platformState{} != -99) by (tgw_id) 
  == bool 
  (6 - count(tgw_SessionStatus_sessionStatus{} == -99) by (tgw_id))
)
+
(
 (6 - count(tgw_SessionStatus_sessionStatus{} == -99) by (tgw_id))
  == bool 
  count(tgw_required_platforms{} == 1) by (tgw_id)
)

panels.title: tgw信息总览（需连上监控端口）

targets.expr:
label_replace(
  tgw_SessionStatus_sessionStatus{tgw_id="${tgw_id}"} == 1 and on(platform_id) tgw_RunStatus_platformState{tgw_id="${tgw_id}"} != -99,
  "status", "normal", "", ""
)
or
label_replace(
  tgw_SessionStatus_sessionStatus{tgw_id="${tgw_id}"} == 2 and on(platform_id) tgw_RunStatus_platformState{tgw_id="${tgw_id}"} != -99,
  "status", "abnormal", "", ""
)
or
label_replace(
  tgw_SessionStatus_sessionStatus{tgw_id="${tgw_id}"} == -99 and on(platform_id) tgw_RunStatus_platformState{tgw_id="${tgw_id}"} != -99,
  "status", "unestablished", "", ""
) 
or 
label_replace(
  tgw_SessionStatus_sessionStatus{tgw_id="${tgw_id}"} == -99 and on(platform_id) tgw_RunStatus_platformState{tgw_id="${tgw_id}"} == -99,
  "status", "unconfigured", "", ""
)
